reviews.comment:
Es un Oasis en el centro de Tandil, cuando los domingos esta todo cerrado, o antes de las 8hs los dias de semana, tenes para tomar café y muchas cosas para comer al paso, desde hamburguesas con queso a sándwich de atún, voy todos los dias xq tengo a un familiar internado cerquita, asi que me salva!!

(Translated by Google)
It's an oasis in the center of Tandil. When everything is closed on Sundays, or before 8 am on weekdays, you can get coffee and lots of things to eat on the go, from cheeseburgers to tuna sandwiches. I go every day because I have a relative hospitalized nearby, so it's a lifesaver!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8137682330194139512/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNNi1MTzJ3RRAB
